inputs.prompt: Newsletter: The Craft. Subject: Business of freelance writing. Cadence: Weekly, Tuesday. Period: Next 8 editions (April-May). Known hooks: World Press Freedom Day (May 3), major publisher announces freelance rate changes (rumoured for late April). Recurring format: Each edition has a main essay and a curated links section. Editorial ambition: Go deeper on one theme — the economics of freelance writing — rather than ranging widely.
Newsletter: Weekend Reader. Subject: Book recommendations and literary culture. Cadence: Weekly. Period: 6 editions. No specific hooks planned.

Newsletter: European Housing Watch. Subject: EU housing policy. Cadence: Fortnightly, Monday. Period: 8 editions (April-July). Known hooks: EU Housing Summit in June; Spain's new rent control law takes effect May 1; quarterly Eurostat housing data release in May. Recurring formats: Policy analysis, city spotlight, data visualization. Editorial ambition: Build a series on 'Europe's Rent Crisis' that culminates in an original Housing Affordability Index release before the EU Summit.
